name: Enies Lobby
description: Enies Lobby is a World Government judicial island where criminals are processed before being sent to Impel Down or executed. The island is perpetually illuminated by a hole in the clouds that creates permanent daylight - it is said night never falls here. The island consists of a massive courthouse, the Tower of Justice, and is connected to the Gates of Justice that lead to Marine Headquarters and Impel Down. No one who passes through these gates has ever returned. The island has ten thousand Marines and government agents stationed there, making it one of the World Government's three major strongholds alongside Marine HQ and Impel Down. It was here that the Straw Hats staged their most audacious rescue mission, declaring war on the World Government itself by having Sogeking shoot down the flag, defeating all of CP9, surviving a Buster Call, and saving Robin - all while the world watched in shock.
history: Enies Lobby has served as the World Government's judicial center for centuries, where the guilty are processed through a mock trial before execution or imprisonment. Tom was brought here years ago and executed after being framed by Spandam. When CP9 captured Robin and Franky, they brought them to Enies Lobby for the same fate. The Straw Hats, joined by the Franky Family and Galley-La foremen, crashed through the front gates on Rocket Man and fought through thousands of Marines to reach the Tower of Justice. The most pivotal moment came when Robin, from atop the tower, finally admitted she wanted to live - contradicting her resignation to die. Luffy declared war on the World Government by having Sogeking burn their flag. The crew then fought CP9 in individual battles across the island, with Luffy unveiling Gear 2 and Gear 3 to defeat Rob Lucci. Spandam accidentally triggered a Buster Call, and ten battleships began obliterating the island. As everyone escaped, the Going Merry - thought destroyed - appeared one last time to save them, Klabautermann and all. After reaching safety, they held a viking funeral for their beloved ship. The incident made global news and resulted in massive bounty increases for the entire crew.
culture: Enies Lobby represents the absolute authority of the World Government and their version of 'justice.' There are no trials here - only guilty verdicts and sentencing. The Marines stationed here are fanatically loyal, viewing the World Government as absolute. The island's perpetual daylight symbolizes the government's claim that 'justice never sleeps.' The architecture is grand and imposing, designed to intimidate. However, the Straw Hats shattered this image, proving that even the World Government's strongholds can fall to those with strong enough conviction.
transportation: Accessed via Sea Train from Water 7. The Gates of Justice connect to Marine Headquarters (Marineford) and Impel Down via special currents. Within the island, there's a massive bridge called the Bridge of Hesitation connecting the courthouse to the Tower of Justice. The island has no civilian transportation - only military vessels and government trains.

notablePeople.name: Monkey D. Luffy
notablePeople.description: Declared war on the World Government and defeated Rob Lucci using his new Gear 2nd and Gear 3rd techniques. Showed the world that even the government's strongest can be beaten. Nearly died from exhaustion but saved Robin and the crew.

notablePeople.name: Nico Robin
notablePeople.description: Finally admitted she wanted to live after being shown the crew's determination to save her. Her cry of 'I want to live! Take me out to sea with you!' became one of the most iconic moments in One Piece history.

notablePeople.name: Roronoa Zoro
notablePeople.description: Defeated Kaku and his giraffe form using his new Asura technique - a nine-sword style illusion born from his demonic spirit. Pushed his limits to help save Robin.

notablePeople.name: Sanji
notablePeople.description: Defeated Jabra using his Diable Jambe - a new technique where he heats his leg to create fire kicks. His chivalry conflicted with Kalifa's gender, requiring Nami to defeat her instead.

notablePeople.name: Sogeking (Usopp)
notablePeople.description: Shot down the World Government flag, officially declaring war. Later sniped Spandam from an incredible distance to save Robin. Proved his bravery despite his fear. His actions helped him eventually rejoin the crew.

notablePeople.name: Nami
notablePeople.description: Defeated Kalifa using her upgraded Perfect Clima-Tact, showing impressive combat growth. Had to fight in Sanji's place due to his chivalry.

notablePeople.name: Tony Tony Chopper
notablePeople.description: Defeated Kumadori and used Monster Point for the first time - a dangerous transformation that gives him immense power but loses control. Showed the risks he'd take to save his friends.

notablePeople.name: Franky
notablePeople.description: Defeated Fukurou and fought to protect Robin and the Pluton blueprints. His actions during this arc cemented his bond with the Straw Hats, leading to him joining as their shipwright.

notablePeople.name: Rob Lucci
notablePeople.description: The main antagonist who fought Luffy in an intense battle across the island. His Leopard Zoan form and Rokushiki mastery made him Luffy's toughest opponent yet. Defeated but survived.

notablePeople.name: Kaku
notablePeople.description: Fought Zoro using his newly acquired Giraffe Zoan powers combined with his Four-Sword Style. Despite his strength, he was defeated by Zoro's Asura technique.

notablePeople.name: Jabra
notablePeople.description: A wolf Zoan user who fought Sanji. Claims to be in love with anyone who shows him kindness. Defeated by Sanji's new Diable Jambe technique.

notablePeople.name: Kalifa
notablePeople.description: Fought Nami using her Bubble-Bubble Fruit powers that clean away strength. Her 'Sexual Harassment!' catchphrase backfired against Nami's anger.

notablePeople.name: Kumadori
notablePeople.description: A kabuki-styled CP9 agent who fought Chopper. His Life Return technique allows him to control his body and hair. Defeated by Chopper's Monster Point.

notablePeople.name: Fukurou
notablePeople.description: A zipper-mouthed CP9 agent who measures power levels with his 'Doriki' system. Fought and was defeated by Franky. Can't keep secrets despite his zipper mouth.

notablePeople.name: Spandam
notablePeople.description: The cowardly, sadistic leader of CP9 who physically abused Robin and accidentally triggered the Buster Call. Defeated humiliatingly by Robin and Franky. His incompetence destroyed the very island he commanded.

notablePeople.name: Going Merry (Klabautermann)
notablePeople.description: The spirit of the Going Merry appeared one final time to rescue the crew from the Buster Call. Her sacrifice and subsequent viking funeral became one of the series' most emotional moments.

subLocations.name: Main Island Gate
subLocations.description: The massive front gate where Rocket Man crashed through, beginning the assault. Thousands of Marines were stationed here but couldn't stop the combined forces.

subLocations.name: Courthouse
subLocations.description: The massive courthouse where 'trials' occur - though all verdicts are guilty. The Straw Hats and allies fought through thousands of Marines here.

subLocations.name: Tower of Justice
subLocations.description: The massive tower where Robin was held and where most of the CP9 battles occurred. Spandam's office is at the top. The site of Robin's 'I want to live!' moment.

subLocations.name: Bridge of Hesitation
subLocations.description: The long bridge connecting the courthouse to the Tower of Justice, spanning the waterfall to the abyss below. Named for prisoners' last hesitation before judgment. Site of major battles.

subLocations.name: Underground Passage
subLocations.description: Secret passages beneath the island used by Spandam to transport Robin. The Straw Hats pursued through these tunnels during the rescue.

subLocations.name: Gates of Justice
subLocations.description: The enormous gates that control access to Marine HQ and Impel Down. No one who passes through returns. The Buster Call fleet emerged from here.

subLocations.name: Buster Call Destruction Zone
subLocations.description: The entire island became a war zone when ten battleships and five Vice Admirals began the Buster Call, indiscriminately destroying everything with cannon fire.

items.name: Gear 2nd
items.description: Luffy's new technique using his rubber body to pump blood faster, dramatically increasing his speed and power. Debuted against Blueno and perfected against Lucci.

items.name: Gear 3rd
items.description: Luffy's technique where he inflates his bones to giant size for devastating attacks, though it leaves him shrunken afterward. First used against Lucci.

items.name: Asura
items.description: Zoro's nine-sword style illusion technique born from his demonic spirit. Creates the image of a three-faced, six-armed demon. Used to defeat Kaku.

items.name: Diable Jambe
items.description: Sanji's new technique where he spins to heat his leg, creating fire kicks. The heat and flames add massive power to his attacks. Used to defeat Jabra.

items.name: Monster Point
items.description: Chopper's uncontrolled ultimate form accessed by taking three Rumble Balls. Gives him massive power but he loses consciousness and goes berserk.

items.name: CP9 Keys
items.description: Five keys held by CP9 members. One opens Robin's seastone handcuffs. The key mystery added tension as each member had to be defeated.

items.name: Golden Den Den Mushi
items.description: Spandam's transponder snail that authorized the Buster Call. He accidentally triggered it, causing the island's destruction.

items.name: Buster Call
items.description: The World Government's ultimate destruction protocol - ten battleships and five Vice Admirals obliterate an entire island with overwhelming firepower.

items.name: World Government Flag
items.description: The flag representing the World Government's authority. Sogeking shot it down, officially declaring war on the world's ruling power.

items.name: Going Merry's Spirit
items.description: The Klabautermann - the ship spirit of the Going Merry that appeared to save the crew one last time before her final goodbye.

factions.name: Straw Hat Pirates (Invasion Force)
factions.description: The pirate crew that declared war on the World Government, defeated all of CP9, and rescued Robin from the government's judicial stronghold.

factions.name: CP9
factions.description: The World Government's elite assassination unit, all defeated by the Straw Hats and their allies. Later abandoned by the government.

factions.name: Enies Lobby Marines
members: Oimo and Kashii (giants who switched sides)
factions.description: The massive Marine force stationed at Enies Lobby, overwhelmed by the invasion force's determination.

factions.name: Galley-La & Franky Family Alliance
factions.description: Former enemies who united to help rescue Robin and oppose the World Government's injustice.

factions.name: Buster Call Fleet
factions.description: The overwhelming military force that destroyed Enies Lobby with indiscriminate bombardment, showing the government's willingness to sacrifice its own.

events: Rocket Man crashes through main gate
Sogeking shoots down World Government flag
Chopper vs Kumadori (Monster Point debut, Chopper wins)
Sanji vs Jabra (Diable Jambe debut, Sanji wins)
Zoro vs Kaku (Asura debut, Zoro wins)
Spandam beats Robin while dragging her
Luffy defeats Lucci with final Jet Gatling
Crew escapes but trapped by Marines
Merry rescues everyone one last time
New bounties issued for all crew

quickFacts: Straw Hats declared war on World Government
Going Merry's final rescue and funeral

videos.title: I Want to Live - Robin's Cry
videos.description: The most iconic moment where Robin finally admits she wants to live and asks the crew to save her.

videos.title: Luffy vs Rob Lucci - Final Battle
videos.description: The intense final battle featuring Gear 2nd, Gear 3rd, and Luffy's determination to save Robin.

videos.title: Going Merry's Funeral
videos.description: The emotional viking funeral as the crew says goodbye to their beloved ship.
